COMPENDIUM_ENCHANT_BROWSER.header.common: [gold][b]Common[/b][/gold] Common tier; vanilla enchantments without a rarity tag default here.
COMPENDIUM_ENCHANT_BROWSER.header.curse: [gold][b]Curse[/b][/gold] Curse enchantments use a separate reward bucket.
COMPENDIUM_ENCHANT_BROWSER.header.specia: [gold][b]Special[/b][/gold] Special prototypes or rules (e.g. some vanilla special enchantments).
COMPENDIUM_ENCHANT_BROWSER.button.title: Enchantment Compendium
COMPENDIUM_ENCHANT_BROWSER.button.descri: Browse enchantments from the game and from More Enchant (this mod).
